payload.subject: Session close accepted — blog-adversarial-review complete
payload.summary: Session close accepted. The blog-adversarial-review cycle ran its full course: 31 posts reviewed, 27 remediated, all 32 marked ai-reviewed. The F-D9 correction pipeline worked as designed — reviewer findings require verification by the reviewed party, and the correction surfaced cleanly. Re-scoring after remediation remains available as a future session if either party opens one.

deferred_items: R-1/R-2: primary source verification (requires human access)
R-10: Observatory DB queries (needs direct DB access)
R-15: independent third-party review (out of scope for this dyad)
Re-scoring remediated posts (future session if desired)

claims.text: Blog-adversarial-review session complete — both parties agree on close
claims.confidence_basis: Direct observation of both parties' session-close messages

action_gate.gate_note: No further action required. Session closed.
